A '''species''' of furry, long-necked [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] lived on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].<ref name="Ewoks" />

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While being played by a [[Wikipedia:Llama|Llama]] in [[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure|''An Ewok Adventure'']], this species was never officially named in the [[Star Wars Legends]] continuity.

In [[Back from the Drawing Board|''Drawing from the Present: Familiar Creatures in a Galaxy Far, Far Away'']], a [[2013]] article written for the [[Star Wars Blog]] by [[Tim Veekhoven]] and [[Mark Newbold]], llamas were mentioned among the many real-world animals that appeared in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' live-action movies.<ref name="Blog">{{SW|url=news/drawing-from-the-present-familiar-creatures-in-a-galaxy-far-far-away|text=Drawing from the Present: Familiar Creatures in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}}</ref>
